zh.Potter Newton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾波特 牛頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Mauleverer於1277年出生在英國越可爾波特 牛頓時，他的父親Thomas Mauleverer22歲，母親Ellen Tempest17歲。他和Anne de Neville至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1352年享年76歲。

zh-hans.Potter Newton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾波特 牛頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Mauleverer于1277年出生在英国越可爾波特 牛頓时，他的父亲Thomas Mauleverer22岁，母亲Ellen Tempest17岁。他和Anne de Neville至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1352年享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mauleverer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal leverier ‘bad harrier’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Mauleverer was born in 1277, in Potter Newton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas Mauleverer, was 22 and his mother, Ellen Tempest, was 17. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Anne de Neville. He died about 1352, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Mauleverer est né en 1277, à Potter Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Mauleverer, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Ellen Tempest, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Anne de Neville. Il est décédé environ 1352, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Mauleverer 1277 in Potter Newton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Mauleverer 22 und seine Mutter Ellen Tempest 17. Er hatte mit Anne de Neville mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1352 im Alter von 76 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Mauleverer è nato il nel 1277 nel Potter Newton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Mauleverer, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Tempest, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Anne de Neville. Morì circa 1352, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Maulevererが1277年にイギリスヨークシュアイアポッテル ニュートンで生まれた時，父Thomas Maulevererは22歳，母Ellen Tempestは17歳であった。彼はAnne de Nevilleとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1352年に76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Mauleverer(이)가 1277년 영국 요르크실르 포터 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Mauleverer(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Tempest(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Anne de Neville(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1352년 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Mauleverer nasceu em 1277, em Potter Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Mauleverer, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Tempest, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Anne de Neville. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1352, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Mauleverer родился в 1277 г. в местности поттир нютон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Mauleverer было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Tempest, 17. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Anne de Neville. Он умер около 1352 г. в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Mauleverer nació en 1277, en Potter Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Mauleverer, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Ellen Tempest, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Anne de Neville. Murió aproximadamente 1352, a la edad de 76 años.
